---
title: "Oceňovanie opcií — Interaktívny Dashboard"
author: "Ian Spika"
lang: sk
format:
  dashboard:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: columns
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// --- Pomocne funkcie ---

// Aproximacia distribucnej funkcie standardneho normalneho rozdelenia
function pnorm(x) {
  const a1 =  0.254829592;
  const a2 = -0.284496736;
  const a3 =  1.421413741;
  const a4 = -1.453152027;
  const a5 =  1.061405429;
  const p  =  0.3275911;
  const sign = x < 0 ? -1 : 1;
  x = Math.abs(x) / Math.sqrt(2);
  const t = 1.0 / (1.0 + p * x);
  const y = 1.0 - (((((a5 * t + a4) * t) + a3) * t + a2) * t + a1) * t *
            Math.exp(-x * x);
  return 0.5 * (1.0 + sign * y);
}

// Box-Muller pre normalne nahodne cisla so seedom (LCG)
function rnorm(n, seed) {
  let s = seed;
  function rand() {
    s = (s * 1664525 + 1013904223) % 4294967296;
    return s / 4294967296;
  }
  const out = new Float64Array(n);
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i += 2) {
    const u1 = Math.max(rand(), 1e-12);
    const u2 = rand();
    const r = Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(u1));
    const theta = 2 * Math.PI * u2;
    out[i] = r * Math.cos(theta);
    if (i + 1 < n) out[i + 1] = r * Math.sin(theta);
  }
  return out;
}

function bsCall(S0, K, r, sigma, T) {
  const d1 = (Math.log(S0/K) + (r + 0.5*sigma*sigma)*T) / (sigma*Math.sqrt(T));
  const d2 = d1 - sigma*Math.sqrt(T);
  return S0*pnorm(d1) - K*Math.exp(-r*T)*pnorm(d2);
}

function mcCall(S0, K, r, sigma, T, n, seed) {
  const Z = rnorm(n, seed);
  let sum = 0, sumSq = 0;
  const drift = (r - 0.5*sigma*sigma)*T;
  const vol   = sigma*Math.sqrt(T);
  const disc  = Math.exp(-r*T);
  const payoffs = new Float64Array(n);
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    const ST = S0 * Math.exp(drift + vol * Z[i]);
    const p  = Math.max(ST - K, 0) * disc;
    payoffs[i] = p;
    sum   += p;
    sumSq += p*p;
  }
  const mean = sum / n;
  const variance = (sumSq - n*mean*mean) / (n - 1);
  const se = Math.sqrt(variance / n);
  return { estimate: mean, se: se, payoffs: payoffs };
}
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
bs   = bsCall(S0, K, r, sigma, T)
mc   = mcCall(S0, K, r, sigma, T, n_sim, 42)
diff = Math.abs(mc.estimate - bs)

konvergencia = {
  const ns = [100, 1000, 10000, 100000];
  return ns.map(n => {
    const res = mcCall(S0, K, r, sigma, T, n, 2026);
    return {
      n: n,
      odhad: res.estimate,
      se: res.se,
      chyba: Math.abs(res.estimate - bs)
    };
  });
}
```

## {.sidebar}

### Parametre opcie

```{ojs}
viewof S0    = Inputs.range([50, 200],   {value: 100,  step: 1,    label: "S₀ (cena podkladu)"})
viewof K     = Inputs.range([50, 200],   {value: 100,  step: 1,    label: "K (realizačná cena)"})
viewof r     = Inputs.range([0, 0.15],   {value: 0.05, step: 0.005, label: "r (úroková miera)"})
viewof sigma = Inputs.range([0.05, 0.6], {value: 0.20, step: 0.01, label: "σ (volatilita)"})
viewof T     = Inputs.range([0.1, 3],    {value: 1,    step: 0.1,  label: "T (rokov)"})
viewof n_sim = Inputs.range([1000, 100000], {value: 10000, step: 1000, label: "n (simulácií)"})
```

::: {.callout-note}
Posuvníky menia parametre opcie. Výsledky sa prepočítavajú v reálnom čase priamo v prehliadači.
:::

## Column {width=35%}

### Row {height=33%}

```{ojs}
html`<div style="background:#0d6efd; color:white; padding:1.5rem; border-radius:8px; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center;">
  <div style="font-size:0.95rem; opacity:0.9; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">📐 Black-Scholes cena</div>
  <div style="font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1;">${bs.toFixed(4)}</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8rem; opacity:0.85; margin-top:0.5rem;">analytická hodnota</div>
</div>`
```

### Row {height=33%}

```{ojs}
html`<div style="background:#0dcaf0; color:white; padding:1.5rem; border-radius:8px; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center;">
  <div style="font-size:0.95rem; opacity:0.9; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">🎲 Monte Carlo odhad</div>
  <div style="font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1;">${mc.estimate.toFixed(4)}</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8rem; opacity:0.85; margin-top:0.5rem;">SE = ${mc.se.toFixed(4)} · n = ${n_sim.toLocaleString("sk-SK")}</div>
</div>`
```

### Row {height=34%}

```{ojs}
html`<div style="background:${diff < 0.1 ? "#198754" : (diff < 0.5 ? "#ffc107" : "#dc3545")}; color:white; padding:1.5rem; border-radius:8px; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center;">
  <div style="font-size:0.95rem; opacity:0.9; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">📊 Absolútna odchýlka</div>
  <div style="font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1;">${diff.toFixed(4)}</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8rem; opacity:0.85; margin-top:0.5rem;">|MC − BS|</div>
</div>`
```

## Column {width=65%}

### Row {height=55%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Distribúcia diskontovaných výplat"
Plot.plot({
  width: 700,
  height: 320,
  marginLeft: 50,
  marginBottom: 45,
  x: { label: "diskontovaná výplata (S_T - K)⁺ · e^(-rT)", grid: true },
  y: { label: "frekvencia", grid: true },
  marks: [
    Plot.rectY(
      mc.payoffs,
      Plot.binX({ y: "count" }, { thresholds: 40, fill: "steelblue", fillOpacity: 0.7 })
    ),
    Plot.ruleX([bs], { stroke: "red", strokeWidth: 2, strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
    Plot.ruleX([mc.estimate], { stroke: "darkblue", strokeWidth: 2 }),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```

::: {.text-muted .small}
🔴 Červená prerušovaná čiara: Black-Scholesova cena · 🔵 Modrá plná čiara: Monte Carlo odhad
:::

### Row {height=45%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Konvergencia odhadu pre rastúce n"
Inputs.table(konvergencia, {
  columns: ["n", "odhad", "se", "chyba"],
  header: {
    n: "n",
    odhad: "Odhad MC",
    se: "Štand. chyba",
    chyba: "|MC − BS|"
  },
  format: {
    n: x => x.toLocaleString("sk-SK"),
    odhad: x => x.toFixed(5),
    se: x => x.toFixed(5),
    chyba: x => x.toFixed(5)
  },
  layout: "auto"
})
```
